facts.primaryTitle: The Voice That Haunted the Bell Family
facts.setting: The voice began as scratching in the walls.
criticalEvents: The voice began as scratching in the walls.
Within months, it was speaking to visitors, quoting sermons and promising that John Bell would die.
John Bell and his family was a farming household at the centre of a famous American haunting legend when the story began in early nineteenth-century Tennessee farmland.
The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
facts.threat: The voice began as scratching in the walls.
facts.primaryReveal: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.finalConsequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.unresolvedQuestion: Did John Bell and his family defeat the thing at the centre of the story, or did the encounter simply teach it how to remain hidden?
